title: TransDigm Fourth Quarter Earnings Report and Conference Call Set for Thursday, November 9, 2023
text: CLEVELAND , Oct. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE: TDG) today said it will report fiscal 2023 fourth quarter earnings before the market opens on Thursday, November 9, 2023. A conference call will follow at 11:00 a.m.

title: Is Transdigm Group (TDG) Stock Outpacing Its Aerospace Peers This Year?
text: Here is how TransDigm Group (TDG) and VirTra, Inc. (VTSI) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.

title: Time to Buy These Highly Ranked Aerospace Stocks
text: The Zacks Aerospace sector is currently ranked third out of 16 Zacks sectors as the growth narrative is vastly improving for many of these stocks.
